name: 豪門婚禮現場
description: 婚禮是身份偽裝的第一次公開考驗，失明新郎戴戒指的尷尬、賓客的竊竊私語、險些暴露的危機，將私密困境置於公共場合放大戲劇張力。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: The ring. It drops. Told you Christian is blind. / What's going on with the ring? You missed completely. Are the rumors really true? Is the groom really blind?
